news.headline: Independent Director Bob Pease releases letter to Phillips 66 shareholders in Houston, emphasizing company communication.
news.summary: Houston-based Phillips 66 recently disclosed a communication from Independent Director Bob Pease addressed to the company's shareholders.

news.headline: OvationMR integrates AI Moderator in EthOS for deeper research insights through dynamic follow-up questions based on videos, images, and text.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, OvationMR introduced an innovative EthOS feature: an AI Moderator that prompts intelligent follow-up questions tailored to participant videos, images, and text. This advanced tool aims to assist researchers in delving deeper into insights, enhancing the quality of data collection.

news.headline: Bitcoin price plummets by over 2.5% to $85,100 due to Trump’s tariffs impacting global markets and cryptocurrencies. Market cap down 2.6%. US equities also drop. Correlation strengthens with BTC weekly correlation at 0.88. Risk assets like Bitcoin fall in short term. Traders predict sub-$80K pullback. Market volatility expected until April 2 tariff day. Analysts cautious, foresee potential retest at $78-80K range if support at $84K breaks.
news.summary: Bitcoin's price has dropped over 2.5% in the last 24 hours to $85,100 due to Trump's new tariffs causing market pressure. This decline is part of a broader selloff as the crypto market's market cap fell 2.6% in response to US stocks dropping as well. The S&P 500 closed at 5,693.31 on March 27, Nasdaq fell by 0.53%, and the Dow Jones lost 0.37%. Trump's announcement of a 25% tariff on imported automobiles has escalated trade tensions. Bitcoin's correlation with US stocks is at 0.88. Some analysts, like The Kobeissi Letter, anticipate tech stocks to drop further, indicating more market volatility. Despite some optimism, traders brace for a possible BTC pullback below $80K. Bitcoin needs to reclaim $90,000 to confirm support, or else it may retest the $78,000-$80,000 range. This article does not offer investment advice; all investment decisions should be made after conducting personal research.

news.headline: VinFast and others focus on building seamless EV ownership ecosystem beyond the cars to reduce range anxiety and ensure service ease.
news.summary: In Markham, Ontario, VinFast and prominent companies in the industry are demonstrating the significance of creating a comprehensive ownership ecosystem for electric vehicles to succeed. This ecosystem focuses on eliminating range anxiety, providing dependable service, and simplifying the transition to EVs. The shift towards electric vehicles now emphasizes not only enhancing battery efficiency and cutting expenses but also establishing a seamless EV ownership experience that is effortless and reliable. This approach aims to make owning an EV hassle-free and dependable for consumers.

news.headline: Actelis secures major orders to upgrade US military bases with cyber-hardened networking, GigaLine 800 technology.
news.summary: State-of-the-art GigaLine 800 technology is transforming military bases by providing instant high-speed, cyber-secure connectivity to Army, Navy, and Air Force installations. This advancement marks a significant upgrade in infrastructure, enhancing operational efficiency and effectiveness across the board. Installation of the GigaLine 800 solution has resulted in notable improvements in data transfer speeds, boosting communication capabilities and overall performance within the military sector.

news.headline: Catheter Precision, Inc. reports Q4 and 2024 financial results. Shares trade on NYSE American as VTAK.
news.summary: Fort Mill, South Carolina, on March 28, 2025 - Catheter Precision, Inc., trading on NYSE American under the ticker VTAK, a leading American medical device company specializing in electrophysiology products, disclosed its financial report and operational progress for the span concluding on December 31, 2024.

news.headline: PMGC Holdings Inc. files annual report on Form 10-K, keeping investors updated.
Aptose announces strong year-end 2024 results and key corporate achievements.
Volition presents at ESMO Congress 2025 on Nu.Q®H3K27Me3 biomarker and Nu.Q® H3.1 immunoassay for NSCLC treatment decisions.
news.summary: New research shows that Volition's Nu.Q®H3K27Me3 biomarker, in conjunction with ctDNA, could enhance the predictive accuracy for overall survival in patients with non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC). This combination may be crucial in guiding treatment strategies. Additionally, Volition's Nu.Q®H3.1, an affordable immunoassay, has potential for early detection purposes in NSCLC. Both advancements highlight the importance of these biomarkers in improving patient outcomes.

news.headline: SkylineDx shares significant findings from largest melanoma GEP trial at SSO 2025, highlighting Merlin CP-GEP test's high clinical utility with precise risk stratification, showing high negative predictive value in subgroups.
news.summary: The recent study on the Merlin CP-GEP test has shown significant clinical utility by providing accurate risk stratification for patients, leading to optimized recommendations for SLNB referrals. The study found that in specific subgroups, such as Merlin Low Risk patients, the test demonstrated a notably high negative predictive value (NPV). This indicates the potential for improved clinical outcomes and decision-making processes based on the test results. Ultimately, the Merlin CP-GEP test has shown promising potential in enhancing patient care and treatment strategies.

news.headline: The Kevin Trudeau Show: Limitless premieres new episodes every Wednesday at 9 AM Central on YouTube, diving into self-empowerment, alternative health, and financial independence.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, in Chicago, the series "The Kevin Trudeau Show: Limitless" is set to release new episodes every Wednesday. This show explores self-empowerment, alternative health, and financial independence. It has received both controversy and acclaim for its groundbreaking approach.

news.headline: Trinasolar creates world's first 800W+ tandem module, setting new standard in solar power.
news.summary: In Changzhou, China on March 28, 2025, Trinasolar announced the creation of the first industrial-standard solar PV module globally, capable of generating more than 800W of maximum power. This groundbreaking module, covering an area of 3.1m2, marks a significant advancement in smart PV and energy storage solutions.

news.headline: Wealth Enhancement acquires XO Wealth Management, adding $516M in assets and reaching $107.5B in total assets.
news.summary: Wealth Enhancement's latest collaboration establishes its presence in Texas at the 11th location, contributing to a significant milestone as the firm now oversees over $107.5 billion in client assets. On March 28, 2025, in Minneapolis, Wealth Enhancement, a leading independent wealth management organization focused on improving clients' financial well-being, announced this development.

news.headline: Rhymetec marks 10 years with sustainable growth, credits success to skilled team and global expansion.
news.summary: Celebrating a decade of prosperity, a top cloud security firm credits its sustainable growth to a talented workforce, key partnerships, and global expansion. Based in New York, Rhymetec has thrived as the frontrunner in cloud security over the past 10 years. Their success is fueled by a dedicated team, strategic collaborations, and an expanding international presence.

news.headline: The Purina Institute Global Summit 2025 to explore future of pet nutrition and veterinary care. 2-day event with global experts.
news.summary: A 2-day summit led by global experts is set to delve into the future of pet nutrition and veterinary care driven by cutting-edge technologies. Taking place in St. Louis on March 28, 2025, the Purina Institute Global Summit 2025 will include talks and discussions from leaders in the field. This event promises to provide valuable insights and innovations for the industry.

news.headline: Study shows 40% of Americans satisfied with financial advice, 90% turn to family,friends, only 62% seek professionals.
news.summary: A recent study conducted by the TIAA Institute in partnership with MIT AgeLab found that 90% of Americans prefer to seek financial guidance from their family and friends. In contrast, only 62% of individuals turn to professional advisors for advice. The study, titled "The Future of Advice," highlights the significant role that personal relationships play in shaping financial decisions. This indicates a higher level of trust in close connections compared to certified financial experts. The statistics demonstrate a strong reliance on informal sources of advice when it comes to financial matters among the majority of the American population.

news.headline: GlobalTech Corp reports $18M in revenue for 2024, marking a 72% increase from the prior year, achieving record figures.
news.summary: In the fiscal year 2024, the company achieved a milestone with a record-breaking revenue of $18 million, marking a significant increase of 72% compared to the previous year. This substantial growth highlights the successful performance and expansion of the business, showcasing its potential and profitability in the market.

news.headline: Corbus Pharmaceuticals dosed first patient in Phase 1 trial of CRB-913 for obesity treatment in the US.
news.summary: In Norwood, Massachusetts, on March 28, 2025, Corbus Pharmaceuticals Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: CRBP), a company specializing in oncology and obesity treatments, revealed that they have initiated dosing for the first participant in the Phase 1 trial of CRB-913 for obesity treatment. This phase includes a single ascending dose/multiple ascending dose (SAD/MAD) segment and is currently ongoing in the United States under an open Investigational New Drug application. Corbus, known for its diversified portfolio, is making strides in the development of CRB-913 for combating obesity.

news.headline: Jakks Pacific sets June 20, 2025, for its annual meeting; restructuring of Board of Directors post recapitalization.
news.summary: In Santa Monica, California, on March 28, 2025, JAKKS Pacific, Inc. (NASDAQ: JAKK) disclosed the approval by the Board of Directors for the 2025 annual meeting set for June 20, 2025. The company also revealed alterations to the Board, marking a significant step in finalizing the transition from its 2019 recapitalization transactions.

news.headline: LiqTech International reported Q4 2024 revenue of $3.4M (up 37% from Q3), net loss of $(3.0)M, and FY 2024 revenue of $14.6M. Management aims to lower break-even target and achieve profitability in 2025. Received record North American oil & gas order. Plans Q1 2025 revenue to be between $4.3M - $4.7M, 26%-38% sequential increase. Financials show gross profit margin reduced to 1.7% in 2024 from 15.4% in 2023. Net loss increased to $(10.3)M in 2024 from $(8.6)M in 2023. Cash balance stood at $10.9M on Dec 31, 2024. Additional operational and financial highlights provided concerning LiqTech International's business performance, cost-saving initiatives, and future outlook.
news.summary: LiqTech International, Inc. announced its financial results for Q4 and FY 2024 with Q4 revenue at $3.4 million, a 37% increase from Q3, with a net loss of $(3.0) million. FY 2024 revenue was $14.6 million, a decrease from $18.0 million in FY 2023, with a net loss of $(10.3) million. The company's ending cash balance was $10.9 million. The company expects Q1 2025 revenue to be between $4.3-$4.7 million. They implemented a cost reduction strategy to lower the break-even target to a quarterly revenue of $5.5-$6.0 million, including a 10% reduction in headcount and senior management salaries. LiqTech also received a significant commercial order and entered a joint venture in China. The company aims for profitability in 2025.

news.headline: Captivision reveals new branding, highlighting expanded LED products & customer success. Marks start of growth era.
news.summary: A recently launched website is highlighting an increased range of LED products and recent customer success stories. The platform features a wider selection of LED products, with a focus on customer satisfaction and positive outcomes. This expansion includes a variety of LED options to cater to different needs, ensuring a comprehensive selection for potential buyers. Additionally, the website showcases successful experiences from satisfied customers, underlining the quality and reliability of the products. The increased product range and customer success stories aim to demonstrate the effectiveness and benefits of the LED offerings.

news.headline: Dominari Holdings Inc. reports FY 2024 revenue of $19 million, a 900% increase from 2023, driven by growth strategy.
news.summary: Dominari Holdings Inc. reported a significant increase in revenue for the full year ended December 31, 2024, with approximately $19 million in total revenue, showing a 900% increase from the previous year's $2.0 million. The strong fourth quarter contributed over $8.0 million to the annual revenue. This growth is attributed to the successful execution of the company's growth strategy and increasing market demand for investment banking services. Dominari also co-founded American Data Centers Inc. with a 32% stake, focusing on energy-efficient data centers to meet the rising need for high-performance computing infrastructure. The company has partnered with industry professionals and members of the Trump family. Dominari Securities LLC, a subsidiary, also experienced growth.

news.headline: XFC partners with Band Sports to broadcast live fights in Brazil, reaching 54 million fans, starting with XFC 52.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, Xtreme One Entertainment, Inc. (OTC: XONI), the parent company of XFC Global, partnered with Band Sports to secure exclusive international broadcasting rights for Xtreme Fighting Championships (XFC) MMA events in Brazil. The agreement kicks off with the live broadcast of XFC 52: THE AWAKENING from Iowa City, Iowa. This collaboration marks a significant milestone for XFC, offering Brazilian audiences access to thrilling MMA action.

news.headline: Leatt Corp reports $11.20M revenue in Q4 2024, up 14% from 2023, $44.03M total revenue in 2024 with a $2.20M net loss.
news.summary: Leatt Corporation announced its financial results for Q4 and full year 2024, with a focus on its head-to-toe protective gear for extreme sports. Revenues for Q4 were $11.20 million, up 14% from 2023, with a net loss of $(446,459), a 69% improvement. Full-year revenues were $44.03 million, down 7% from 2023. Cash and equivalents increased to $12.37 million in 2024, with $2.80 million generated from operations. Dr. Christopher Leatt mentioned receiving two 2025 Design & Innovation Awards. The business outlook remains positive, with a new U.S. VP appointed and plans for growth in the ADV market. Total assets at the end of 2024 were $41.17 million, including cash, receivables, and inventory.

news.headline: Oracle software contract ended by pentagon cost-cutters. $ORCL
Inflation concerns rise as Trump 2.0 trade war escalates; brace for impact.
news.summary: Today marks the release of the inflation data, revealing a significant increase in prices. Additionally, the trade war initiated by the current administration has escalated to a new phase, often referred to as "Trump 2.0." The situation is expected to intensify further in the future, with implications for the economy and global trade. Stay tuned for updates on this evolving scenario.

news.headline: BX's buyout fund closing late, missing earlier targets.
Secured Overnight Financing Rate 4.36% March 27 vs 4.35% March 26.
Mediaplanet and Robert Herjavec launch Employee Well-Being campaign to tackle workforce challenges.
news.summary: In a press release dated March 28, 2025, Mediaplanet revealed the commencement of its Employee Well-Being campaign. This campaign aims to tackle the pressing issues confronting the contemporary workforce. It offers HR professionals practical resources to cultivate healthier and more satisfying work environments.

news.headline: Coalition parties in Germany minimize disagreements before crucial discussions, as key talks loom.
Oil set for third weekly increase before Trump's tariffs; the third consecutive rise in a row.
National Triglyceride Alliance forms with support from key pharmaceutical companies and medical associations to educate on high triglycerides. #HealthcareInitiative #TriglycerideManagement
news.summary: In an exciting development, the National Triglyceride Alliance (NTA) was officially launched on March 28, 2025, with support from Ionis Pharmaceuticals, Arrowhead Pharmaceuticals, Amarin Corp, and Alliance Partners alongside leading medical associations. This significant event represents a crucial advancement in the effort to combat high triglyceride levels.

news.headline: Hikvision faces challenges in AIoT amid US sanctions and competition, with shrinking contracts and growing rivals.
news.summary: A recent report titled "Hikvision at a Crossroads: Navigating AIoT Transformation Amid External Pressures" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. Hikvision, a prominent security surveillance provider globally, is encountering various challenges. Externally, U.S. sanctions are limiting its international growth. Internally, the company is facing reduced government contracts and rising competition from smartphone manufacturers and major technology companies. This situation poses a pivotal moment for Hikvision as it navigates through these issues.

news.headline: Purple Biotech to present 3 posters at 2025 AACR Meeting: 1 for CM24 in pancreatic cancer, 2 for NT219 in colorectal/head and neck cancers.
news.summary: Purple Biotech Ltd., a company listed on NASDAQ/TASE as PPBT, operating in Rehovot, Israel, shared plans to showcase upcoming poster presentations at the 2025 American Association for Cancer Research Meeting in Chicago from April 25th to April 30th. The presentations will cover the potential of CM24 in treating pancreatic cancer, as well as NT219 for colorectal and head and neck cancers. These therapies aim to combat tumor immune evasion and drug resistance. This event highlights Purple Biotech's focus on innovative treatments for high-need cancer types, underscoring their commitment to advancing cancer research and care.

news.headline: EU set to issue fines towards the end of next week, fines for Apple and Meta are expected to be relatively modest - Sources
Oil price set for third weekly increase as Trump's tariffs loom, source says.
Israel strikes Beirut's southern suburbs, the first strike there since ceasefire - Witnesses
UAE anticipates launching digital dirham in Q4 2025, aiming to boost financial stability and combat financial crime.
news.summary: The United Arab Emirates is set to launch its digital dirham central bank digital currency in the fourth quarter of 2025. This move is expected to enhance financial stability and combat financial crime. The digital dirham will be accepted in all payment channels and aims to promote the development of innovative digital products and services. In June 2024, the CBUAE approved a licensing framework for regulating stablecoins, leading to the launch of dirham-backed stablecoins by various companies. The Dubai Financial Services Authority recognized Circle's USDC and EURC stablecoins under its crypto token regime, and Ripple is also working to meet the country's stablecoin requirements. The digital dirham received a rebrand with a new symbol, inspired by the UAE flag.

news.headline: Wall Street forecasters adjust Omeros price expectations before Q4 earnings. Analysts predict a loss of 78 cents/share. Omeros shares rose 4.7% to $8.92.
news.summary: Omeros Corporation (NASDAQ:OMER) is set to announce its Q4 financial results on March 31 post stock market closure. Analysts predict a quarterly loss of 78 cents per share for the Seattle-based company, contrasting with a loss of 69 cents per share a year ago as per Benzinga Pro data. On March 21, Omeros issued an update on its Zaltenibart Phase 3 PNH clinical trial program. The company's shares increased by 4.7% to reach $8.92 by the end of trading on Thursday. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Richmond Fed President Tom Barkin says inflation expectations are loosened, not de-anchored. Economist Craig Shapiro accuses Federal Reserve of gaslighting the public.
news.summary: Economist Craig Shapiro criticized the Federal Reserve, accusing them of deceiving the public, after Tom Barkin, President of the Federal Reserve Bank of Richmond, stated that inflation is not completely uncontrolled. Barkin acknowledged during a press interaction that the US economy has experienced a significant period of inflation. He explained that inflation expectations have diminished, but not completely detached, for both businesses and consumers. In response, Shapiro, a macro strategist at the Bear Traps Report, accused the Federal Reserve of attempting to mislead the public by introducing new terminology to suggest that inflation expectations are still under control. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Representative Hill: The US should renegotiate USMCA deal
Report highlights trends in SiC and GaN tech for automotive electrification, 3rd-gen semiconductors key in advancing EVs and charging infrastructure.
news.summary: The report "Development Trends of Third-Generation Semiconductors in Automotive and Charging Applications" has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. These third-generation semiconductors are crucial for the progress of automotive electrification, smart vehicle technologies, and the enhancement of charging infrastructure due to their excellent material characteristics, including high-frequency operation and low power usage. They are increasingly important for the modernization of automotive industry and charging infrastructure.

news.headline: Dynacor Group to pay C$0.01333 dividend per share on April 17, 2025, 61st dividend payment.
news.summary: Montreal-based company Dynacor Group Inc. (TSX: DNG) has disclosed its monthly dividend payment for April 2025, set at C$0.01333 per common share. Shareholders of record as of April 10, 2025, will receive the dividend on April 17, 2025. This marks the 61st dividend and the 51st monthly dividend payment issued by the Corporation. The dividend is classified as an eligible dividend.

news.headline: LAVA reports Q4 2024 results: $76.6M cash balance, 30% workforce reduction, and $5M milestone from J&J. Strategic evaluation ongoing.
news.summary: LAVA Therapeutics N.V. adopted a restructuring plan to extend capital resources, resulting in a 30% reduction in workforce. They have a cash balance of $76.6 million as of Dec 31, 2024, expected to fund operations into 2027. In the Phase 1 trial of LAVA-1266 for AML and MDS, enrollment is progressing. They achieved a development milestone of $5.0 million from Johnson & Johnson in Q4 2024 and received $5.0 million in revenue from contracts with customers in the same quarter. Additionally, they received a clinical development milestone of $7 million from Pfizer in Q1 2024. Research and development expenses were $8.6 million in Q4 2024, mainly due to discontinuation of LAVA-1207, while general and administrative expenses reduced due to lower share-based compensation. Net loss was $3.8 million in Q4 2024, with a total net loss of $25.1 million for the year.

news.headline: Korea Zinc's AGM on March 28, 2025 showed current management maintaining board control with strong shareholder support.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, in Seoul, South Korea, Korea Zinc (KRX:010130) revealed the results of its annual general meeting (AGM), confirming that the existing management has maintained control of the board amidst challenges from competitors MBK and Young Poong. This marks the 51st AGM for Korea Zinc.

news.headline: Private equity firm ASC partners with Dynamic Campus, a top provider of managed services for educational institutions.
news.summary: Earlier today in New York, Atlantic Street Capital (ASC), a private equity firm specializing in investments in lower middle market companies with strong growth potential, revealed a collaboration with Dynamic Campus, a prominent company offering managed services. This announcement signifies a significant development in the sector as ASC intends to support Dynamic Campus in further expanding its operations.

news.headline: Covering the cost of Trump's tax cut will lead to more potholes on the road, with an estimated $1 trillion needed for repairs.
Base Carbon to host investor call on April 1 at 11:00 a.m. EDT.
news.summary: Toronto, as of March 28, 2025 - Base Carbon Inc. (Cboe CA: BCBN) (OTCQX: BCBNF) is set to conduct an investor update call on Tuesday, April 1, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time (EDT). Base Carbon, operating through its wholly-owned subsidiary, Base Carbon Capital Partners Corp., will provide details during the call.

news.headline: Winline Technology debuts energy solutions at Solar & Storage Live Africa 2025, empowering South Africa's green shift.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, in Johannesburg, Shenzhen Winline Technology Co., Ltd. showcased its latest energy resilience technologies at Solar & Storage Live Africa 2025. The company, a top player in electric vehicle (EV) charging solutions, introduced groundbreaking innovations to address critical needs in the industry. The event highlighted advancements that are expected to significantly impact the EV market, with a focus on sustainability and efficiency.

news.headline: Lomond Therapeutics secures funding with second and third closings, adds two new investors. (Characters: 95)
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, Lomond Therapeutics Holdings, Inc., a biotechnology company based in Dover, Delaware, announced its focus on discovering and creating top-quality medications for hematological malignancies. Lomond Therapeutics is currently in the clinical stage and aims to develop innovative treatments for these diseases.
